findings.summary: materializeRegistry and reconcileMcpSessionRegistry filtered stopped or no-live bindings before reserving their sessionKey values.
WorkspaceService.searchMcpSessions returned only matches and dropped zero-match or ambiguous failure metadata.
backfillLegacyWorkspaceTabs still allowed an active legacy tab to reuse a stopped tab sessionKey when active input appeared first.

summary: No findings. materializeRegistry, reconcileMcpSessionRegistry, and backfillLegacyWorkspaceTabs now reserve stopped keys before active repair. WorkspaceService.searchMcpSessions preserves full search result metadata. Regression tests cover duplicate key reservation, user-alias ranking, zero-match, and ambiguous search paths.
